raw_consumer_statement:
THIS COMPLAINT WAS NOT ADDRESSED AT ALL. INSTEAD XXXX FROM THE OFFICE OF VICE PRESIDENT RESPONDED TO XXXX CLAIMS AND MADE THE RESPONSE THE SAME FOR EACH CLAIM. EVEN THOUGH IN HER RESPONSE IT CLEARLY STATES WHAT SHE IS RESPINDING TO. VERY SLOPPY, MESSY AND RUSHED WORK. ALSO LYING STATING SHE TRIED TO CONTACT ME WHEN SHE DID NOT. 

I opened a dispute for a defective XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/year> ( Case ID : XXXX ). On XX/XX/year>, Barclays left a voicemail requesting that I contact them. I returned their call on XX/XX/year> with no luck in getting a rep, and again on XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX calls were recorded. On XX/XX/year>, I spoke with a representative named XXXX, who informed me that Barclays had closed my dispute under the assumption that I no longer wanted to continue it. This is false, as I made multiple attempts to reach them. Barclays appears to be deliberately closing dispute investigations and misrepresenting customer interactions, seemingly hoping that customers will give up. Additionally, Barclays fails to provide any documentation or evidence to support their decisions when denying disputes. This lack of transparency and accountability is unfair and unacceptable. I request that my dispute be properly investigated and that Barclays be held accountable for their misleading and deceptive practices.
